prompt: Write a 3-email welcome sequence for ShopFlow, a social commerce tool for Filipino small business owners who sell on Facebook and Instagram. The tool automates order tracking, inventory, and customer messaging. Most users are solo entrepreneurs or micro-businesses. We have 15,000+ merchants and process 500K+ orders/month. The audience is mostly Millennial women running online shops.

assertions.text: All email subject lines are under 40 characters for mobile truncation
Conversational and warm tone appropriate for Filipino audience
Includes social proof with 15,000+ merchants and/or 500K+ orders
References Facebook and/or Instagram selling context specifically
Emails build progressively: welcome → activation → value/retention
Provides 2+ labeled variations with different approaches
